use_cases: Creating resizable split-view layouts for document or code editing interfaces
Building dashboard panels with adjustable widths for personalized workspaces
Implementing side-by-side comparison views for products or content
Designing file browser layouts with resizable navigation and content areas
Constructing email or messaging interfaces with list-detail split views
ai_summary: A resizable split-view layout component from Ark UI that divides content into two draggable panels separated by a resize handle. Supports keyboard navigation via aria-labels, dark mode theming, and smooth hover/active states on the resize trigger. Used for creating adjustable workspace layouts in dashboards, code editors, file browsers, and comparison interfaces.
